value_propagation.rule: When a value cell changes, all transitive dependents are recalculated
value_propagation.example: Changing A1 recalculates cells whose formulas reference A1 directly or transitively

formula_evaluation.rule: All intermediate calculations retain full IEEE 754 double precision internally
formula_evaluation.example: D2 = D1/3 retains full precision for downstream calculations; rounding applies only at output

dependency_management.rule: The dependency graph always reflects the current definition of each cell
dependency_management.example: If a cell's formula changes, the graph must update to match the new references

cycle_handling.rule: Circular dependencies are detected via DFS back-edge detection; only true cycles are reported
cycle_handling.example: K1→K2→K3→K1 is a cycle; diamond-shaped and chain-shaped graphs are not

conditional_evaluation.rule: IF evaluates only the branch selected by the condition (short-circuit semantics)
conditional_evaluation.example: IF(true, A1, K1) returns A1 without evaluating K1

batch_semantics.rule: Batch updates apply all changes atomically before recalculating the affected set
batch_semantics.example: Changing G1, G2, G3 in a batch recalculates their dependents exactly once

recalculation_ordering.rule: Recalculation follows topological order with alphabetical tie-breaking at equal depth
recalculation_ordering.example: Cells M1, M2, M3 with identical topological depth evaluate in that alphabetical order

type_transitions.rule: When a cell transitions from formula to value (or vice versa), its dependency graph edges are updated accordingly
type_transitions.example: A formula cell becoming a value cell has all its outgoing dependency edges removed

error_propagation.rule: A reference to a cell in error state causes the referencing cell to also enter error state
error_propagation.example: A cell referencing a cycle member evaluates to null

output_format.rule: Final output values are rounded to the configured precision (default 6 decimal places)
output_format.example: D2 = 2/3 appears as 0.666667 in the output with precision=6
